tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glucose control and possible prediabetes or early diabetes. Renal function (urea, creatinine) is within normal limits. Electrolytes are normal except for a slightly low total CO₂, which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis. Lipid profile is within target ranges. Overall, no acute abnormalities, but glycemic control should be optimized and low CO₂ monitored if clinically indicated.

text.div: Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil
